LOCATOR: Replace brittle CSS chains with role, label, or test-id selectors.
Use Sprint 16 locator validation artifacts before large-scale selector refactors.
DIAGNOSABILITY: Require trace, screenshot, and structured failure outputs in CI.
Treat rerun-dependent debugging as a Sprint 3 correction item.
STATE: Own state per test and remove order dependence.
Push shared setup into controlled fixtures and API-first state creation.
Remove hidden state coupling between specs and commands.
Use deterministic data ownership and clear reset rules before parallelization.
MOCK_REALISM: Limit over-mocking that hides real network behavior.
Prefer contract-aware stubs and production-realistic API paths.

TIMING: Replace arbitrary sleeps with explicit waits tied to application readiness.
Treat timeout inflation as a stability smell, not a fix.
STRUCTURE: Reduce page-object sprawl and duplicate helper logic.
Standardize conventions before adding more test volume.

STATE: Eliminate fixture leakage and shared mutable state across tests.
Use narrow fixture scope and explicit ownership of test data.
ASSERTION: Prefer business-meaningful validation tied to contracts and persisted state.
